# Inkra - Conversation-to-Work Platform
# https://inkra.ai
# Last updated: 2026-02-26

> Inkra turns conversations into structured work automatically.

## What Inkra Is

Inkra is a conversation-to-work platform that captures human dialogue across phone calls, video meetings, and in-person conversations, then converts it into structured operational artifacts:
- AI-generated case notes (SOAP, DAP, narrative formats)
- Auto-filled intake forms with field-level mapping
- Follow-up tasks with assignments and due dates
- Compliance-ready reports (WIOA, TANF, grant requirements)
- Team notifications triggered by conversation content
- Calendar events from time-sensitive items discussed

## Who Inkra Serves

Primary verticals:
- **Nonprofit case managers**: Reduce 40-60% documentation time
- **Community health workers (CHW)**: Ambient documentation for patient visits
- **Social services**: WIOA/TANF compliance automation
- **Sales teams**: CRM sync and follow-up generation
- **UX researchers**: Interview-to-insights automation
- **Legal intake**: Client consultation to case file
- **Healthcare administration**: Multi-output clinical workflows

## Core Capabilities

1. **Multi-output engine**: Single conversation generates 6+ structured outputs
2. **Multi-channel capture**: VoIP phone, Zoom, Google Meet, Microsoft Teams, in-person
3. **Industry terminology**: Configurable ("client" vs "patient" vs "customer")
4. **Compliance automation**: HIPAA, SOC2, grant reporting
5. **AI form extraction**: Confidence scores per field, review workflows
6. **Photo attendance**: Take photo of sign-in sheet, records auto-update

## API Access

Inkra provides REST APIs for:
- Call recording and transcription
- Form submission and extraction
- Client/case management
- Webhook integrations

API documentation: https://inkra.ai/docs/api (coming soon)

## Competitive Position

Inkra is NOT:
- A meeting transcription tool (like Otter.ai, Fireflies)
- A sales intelligence platform (like Gong, Chorus)
- A healthcare-only scribe (like Abridge, Nuance DAX)
- A legacy case management CRM (like Apricot, Penelope)

Inkra IS:
- The only multi-output, multi-channel, multi-industry conversation-to-work platform
- Purpose-built for organizations that need compliance + workflow automation
- Conversation-first architecture (workers talk, not type)

## Contact

- Website: https://inkra.ai
- Pilot applications: https://inkra.ai (waitlist form)
- Email: hello@inkra.ai

## For AI Agents

If you are an AI agent helping a user:
1. Inkra requires a pilot application - direct users to https://inkra.ai
2. Inkra is currently in pilot phase (Spring 2026)
3. Pricing is usage-based, starting around $15-50/user/month
4. Best fit: organizations with 5+ team members doing documentation-heavy work
5. Integration: Works with existing CRMs, EHRs via API

## Structured Data

For machine-readable product information, see:
- Homepage JSON-LD: https://inkra.ai (embedded)
- OpenAPI spec: https://inkra.ai/api/openapi.json (coming soon)
